Business logic embedded in store: invokeEndpoint mixes credentials check, API invocation, response handling, and preset saving
Direct localStorage access in onRehydrateStorage callback (localStorage.removeItem)
suggestions: Extract getRustCreds() to src/utils/awsCredentials.ts or use credentials from awsStore directly
Create InvokeEndpointUseCase to encapsulate invoke endpoint business logic
Replace localStorage.removeItem with migration function in persist middleware

files.purpose: Manages AWS SSM parameters and Secrets Manager secrets with value caching and CRUD operations
issues: DRY violation: getRustCreds() pattern duplicated (same as awsStore, apiGatewayStore)
Cache invalidation issue: only checks if value exists, doesn't account for updated last_modified timestamps
suggestions: Extract getRustCreds() to shared utility
Implement proper cache invalidation based on last_modified comparison
Consider adding batch fetch operations (ssm_batch_get_parameters, secrets_batch_get_secret_value)

files.purpose: Manages AWS accounts, credentials, SSM tunnel lifecycle, and global settings with persistence and legacy migration
issues: Violates SRP: single store manages accounts, credentials, SSM tunnels, and global settings
Magic strings: 'ssm-tunnel-${id}' hardcoded in toggleTunnel
Race condition: toggleTunnel async operations without mutex/lock preventing concurrent toggles
Complex legacy migration code embedded in onRehydrateStorage
Direct localStorage access: localStorage.removeItem in onRehydrateStorage
suggestions: Split into separate focused stores: useAccountsStore, useSsmTunnelsStore, useGlobalSettingsStore
Create SERVICE_ID_PREFIX constant for magic strings
Add mutex/lock mechanism for toggleTunnel to prevent concurrent SSM operations
Extract legacy migration to a standalone migration file/function
Use persist migration instead of direct localStorage manipulation

files.purpose: Manages CloudWatch tab navigation state and preloaded data for metrics, logs, ECS, Lambda, Step Functions, and invoke tester
issues: Unused parameters prefixed with underscore: _clusterArn, _serviceArn in goToEcs
Inconsistent function signatures: clearPreloadedEcsServiceName has no parameters while others do
No validation of preloaded data structure before storing
suggestions: Remove unused parameters from function signatures entirely
Add validation schema (Zod) for preloaded data objects
Standardize function signature patterns for consistency

files.purpose: Manages ECS cluster/service selection ARNs and resource prefix filters with persistence
issues: Hardcoded magic values: ['ms-', 'ts-', 'mfe-'] prefixes embedded in store default
No validation for ARNs or prefix patterns
Persisting transient state (selectedClusterArn, selectedServiceArn) unnecessarily
suggestions: Move default prefixes to configuration file or allow user customization
Add Zod validation for ARN format and prefix patterns
Use partialize to persist only resourcePrefixes, not transient selection state

files.purpose: Manages AWS Step Functions machine and execution selection state
issues: Store only holds selection ARNs, not actual machine/execution data - requires repeated API fetches
No caching layer for fetched machines/executions
Missing error state for failed API operations
Clearing selectedExecutionArn on machine change loses user's last viewed execution
suggestions: Add cache for machines and executions with timestamps for TTL invalidation
Add error state: { machineError: string | null, executionError: string | null }
Consider keeping executionArn in state with warning that data may be stale
Add loading state per resource type

summary: AccountCreateDialog.tsx: Dialog component for creating new AWS accounts with both manual input and quick paste modes for credentials. | AccountDetailView.tsx: Displays and edits AWS account credentials with authentication testing and quick paste support. | AccountSidebar.tsx: Sidebar component displaying the list of AWS accounts with active selection, deletion, and SSM plugin detection. | ApiGatewayDetails.tsx: Shows API Gateway details including resources tree, stage selection, and OpenAPI/Swagger contract preview with export options. | ApiGatewayList.tsx: Lists all REST and HTTP/WebSocket APIs with filtering, favorites, and search functionality. | ApiGatewayPanel.tsx: Main panel combining API Gateway list and details views with search toolbar and refresh functionality. | ApiGatewayTester.tsx: Dialog wrapper for testing API Gateway endpoints with method/path display. | ApiInvoker.tsx: Main API testing interface with three-column layout showing API list, resource tree, and tester view | ApiResourcesTree.tsx: Builds hierarchical tree of API resources/endpoints from REST and HTTP API types | ApiTesterView.tsx: API request tester with request/response tabs, execution history, and automatic contract-based body generation | ApiTreeItem.tsx: Renders expandable API tree nodes with method badges, details panels, and Lambda log navigation | CloudWatchPanel.tsx: Main CloudWatch dashboard container with tabbed navigation for AWS services (EC2, Lambda, S3, etc.) | EC2Panel.tsx: EC2 instance management panel with SSH/SSM connections, instance actions, and SSM port forwarding tunnels | Ec2InstanceRow.tsx: Individual EC2 instance row with expandable details, state icons, and connection/action buttons | Ec2SshSettings.tsx: SSH connection settings form with username/key/port inputs and AWS certificate download button | Ec2StateIcon.tsx: Renders color-coded state icon for EC2 instance lifecycle states | Ec2Tab.tsx: Main EC2 tab orchestrating instance list, SSH/SSM connections, and SSM tunneling via external Rust commands | Ec2Terminal.tsx: Terminal interface for EC2 SSH sessions or SSM sessions with log viewing, command input, auto-scroll, and connection controls | EcsTab.tsx: ECS cluster management UI showing cluster list, service tasks, container configuration with secret resolution, and resource-themed styling | EnvVarsTab.tsx: UI for browsing and interacting with AWS SSM Parameters and Secrets Manager with on-demand value fetching and clipboard copy | InvokeTesterTab.tsx: Container tab that switches between Lambda, Step Functions, and API Gateway invoker sub-panels based on navigation state | InvokerJsonEditor.tsx: Reusable JSON textarea with real-time validation, visual invalid state indicator, and one-click JSON formatting | LambdaInvoker.tsx: Lambda invocation interface supporting AWS/local targets with function search, event JSON editing, execution history, and local workspace integration | LambdaTab.tsx: Lambda function browser with search, list view, detailed configuration panel, and navigation to logs and invoker | LogsTab.tsx: CloudWatch Logs viewer with virtualized rendering, smart JSON parsing, filter highlighting, request ID navigation, favorites, and resource type detection with deep-linking | MetricsTab.tsx: CloudWatch Metrics explorer with namespace/metric search, multi-stat area chart visualization, dimension filtering, and time range controls | PlatformSetupGuide.tsx: Platform-specific installation guide for AWS SSM Session Manager plugin on Windows (exe/winget), Linux (deb/rpm), and macOS (homebrew) | ProfileOverrideCard.tsx: Card component allowing per-account SSM plugin path override with inline editing | S3Tab.tsx: S3 browser tab for listing buckets, navigating objects with breadcrumbs, and downloading files | SettingsTab.tsx: Main AWS settings tab showing account sidebar and detail view with credential management | SfnAslDiagram.tsx: Visualizes AWS Step Functions ASL definitions as an interactive SVG flowchart with nodes, edges, and selection highlighting | SfnExecutionInspector.tsx: Executions inspector showing step history, input/output in Monaco editor, and state machine definition with syntax highlighting | SfnExecutionList.tsx: Lists Step Functions execution history with status badges and links to CloudWatch logs | SfnInvoker.tsx: Invokes Step Functions state machines locally or on AWS with JSON input editor, diagram view, and execution history | SfnMachineSelector.tsx: Dropdown selector for Step Functions state machines with search, filtering, and auto-selection | SfnStepCard.tsx: Displays a single step in Step Functions execution history with input/output diffing and Lambda/SFN navigation links | SsmTerminal.tsx: Interactive xterm.js terminal connected to SSM sessions via Tauri PTY IPC events | StepFunctionsTab.tsx: AWS Step Functions tab layout component composing machine selector, execution list, and inspector panels | apiGatewayTypes.ts: TypeScript interfaces for API Gateway execution history tracking | cwUtils.tsx: Shared utilities for AWS integration: persisted state hook, credential parsing, OS detection, and AWS resource ARN extraction | ec2Types.ts: TypeScript interfaces and utility functions for EC2 instance management and SSH session handling | ecsTypes.ts: TypeScript interfaces for Amazon ECS clusters, services, tasks, and container definitions | lambdaTypes.ts: TypeScript interfaces for AWS Lambda functions, invocation results, and execution history | sfnTypes.ts: TypeScript interfaces for AWS Step Functions execution history | useApiGatewayQueries.ts: React Query hooks for AWS API Gateway operations (list APIs, resources, methods, stages, swagger export) | useAwsQueries.ts: React Query hooks for AWS EC2 and CloudWatch operations with error handling for session expiration | useEcsQueries.ts: React Query hooks for AWS ECS operations (clusters, services, tasks, task definitions,
